params.name: Carmen Lucia Ruby
params.description:
On Nov 1, 1930 AD, Dr. Peter Bucker acquired this ruby and named it after his wife, Carmen Lucia.
The Carmen Lucia Ruby is one of the few giant rubies in the world. It is named after the wife of Dr. Peter Bucker. She loved all kinds of jewelry, and when she saw a photo of this ruby in a newspaper, she had a strong yearning for it. Unfortunately, she fell ill soon after and died of cancer a year later. To commemorate his beloved wife, Dr. Bucker acquired this gemstone, named it after his belov …
